en: Does your company have a preventative maintenance program for company-owned equipment and vehicles?
Please list the types of vehicles and equipment that are included.
Does your company have a policy/best practice on mobile phone usage while operating a motor vehicle?
How many of your vehicles are equipped with VDR's (Video Data Recorder)?
Does your company have a policy and program for managing driver fatigue?
Does your company have a policy requiring routine employee driver license checks?
Does your company require a 'spotter' when backing a vehicle?
Does your company have a formal driver training program?
Are all company vehicles or vehicles driven while performing work for your company equipped with airbags and/or seatbelts?
Do drivers conduct documented inspections of vehicles prior to use?
Does your company have a pre-employment screening program for new drivers?
If yes, what is the frequency of the training?
Does your company have a policy requiring that signs, stickers or labels are to be fitted in such a\r\nmanner that they do not obstruct the driver's vision or impede the driver's use of any controls?
